title: Unreleased Q or Shin Eva Materials from the Khara Expo
display_title: Unreleased Q or Shin Eva Materials from the Khara Expo
wikitext:
[]: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Wed Nov 23, 2016 3:34 pm http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4898.html Two new imageboards, and four new settei illustrations. The first settei piece is the Wunder medical room, which is described as being used to treat patients outside of combat; during combats with mass casualties, the cabins and the eating hall are converted to deal with additional patients. The second piece is Asuka and Mari's shared room; the bed in the middle divides the room into two halves. Asuka is lying on the bed playing video games. The remaining settei pieces and the two imageboards have no descriptions.

[]: Re: Unreleased Q Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Wed Nov 23, 2016 3:43 pm Are those......... horns on two of these figure heads? SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by unitM » Wed Nov 23, 2016 5:31 pm SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Nov 23, 2016 5:53 pm That's the Eva Graveyard underneath Unit 13! What the hell is going on there? This definitely looks like Unit 01 with the Spear of Longinus. I can't tell if it's walking in snow or if there's flowing water. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by andreh » Wed Nov 23, 2016 6:32 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: That's the Eva Graveyard underneath Unit 13! What the hell is going on there?

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Nov 23, 2016 6:44 pm Oh wow, it does! I didn't notice that at all! I thought the head was tilted forward and that mechanism was plugged into the back, but now that you've pointed it out it definitely looks like the head is upturned.

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Wed Nov 23, 2016 7:51 pm Given the hornéd things have something coming out of their mouth it might be important.

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Nov 23, 2016 8:27 pm Those are the "Adams" from Until you come to me being Speared in the mouth. A nearly identical shot is in the short but none of them have horns.

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Wed Nov 23, 2016 8:46 pm So they are. The spiral pattern on the mouth things is much more clear. I'll note that the wiki calls them 'Evangelions' and they now have Shogouki horns, suggesting that identity. Why do you say they're Adams?

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Nov 23, 2016 9:10 pm ^That's been speculation for a while. Four nearly identical beings with the four Spears all grouped together points toward them possibly being the Adams. There's never been any official writing about them, which is why I put the word in quotes.

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 23, 2016 11:33 pm Someone suggested the small sketch-like thing on the "raft" is Pen Pen❤️ I want to believe (...that these are potential sketches from Shin Eva, as Minna no Eva Fan Twitter suggests).

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by xfs » Wed Nov 23, 2016 11:54 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 24, 2016 12:23 am SoryuUberAlles wrote: I'll note that the wiki calls them 'Evangelions'

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by SoryuUberAlles » Thu Nov 24, 2016 6:43 am Is the wiki really wide open? I always assumed there was a vetting process to editors like with the commentary project.

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Nov 24, 2016 7:03 am Well, you need to ask...

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Nov 24, 2016 7:27 am If the horned creatures are still canon to NTE, and if those creature are meant to be the four Adams, I wonder if Khara was attempting to make the case that both Eva 01 and Mark 13 are actually two of the four Adams.

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Nov 24, 2016 7:31 am ^And if those creatures are canon, which version is correct? The one with horns or the one without? xfs wrote: The obvious question is what is this place? What is the megastructure? Only Black Moon can be this huge right?

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Nov 24, 2016 7:55 am BlueBasilisk wrote: ^And if those creatures are canon, which version is correct? The one with horns or the one without?

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Nov 24, 2016 4:26 pm Nice to finally have some new tidbits! The Wunder's med bay have much more tech than I would had imagined, but still the whole place give the vibes of a submarine with how spartan everything is, especially Asuka and Mari's room, although I have the feeling that there was a more comfortable bunk bed on the side of the room before, but that this horribly Spartan bunk bed was bolted in the middle because Asuka wanted her own space (that Mari surely invades all the time! ), comfort be damned! (and she still has her videogame nerd habits!). In fact, now that I think about it more, it gives me vibes of the Avenger from the XCOM 2 videogame: kinda Spartan and cramped (albeit less that the Wunder) but very hi-tech! With the image of the sort of dry dock where the Wunder lies, I think that WILLE indeed does have a lot of resources, they just don't like wasting anymore than necessary. BlueBasilisk wrote: That's the Eva Graveyard underneath Unit 13! What the hell is going on there?

[]: Re: Unreleased Q (or Shin Eva?) Materials from the Khara Expo?             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Sun Nov 27, 2016 3:06 am Looks like they have replaced some of the images with new ones - !! https://twitter.com/air_dotter/status/8 ... 9599647745 https://twitter.com/air_dotter/status/8 ... 1036225536 Here are some flowers for Anno from Hayao ^^ https://twitter.com/air_dotter/status/8 ... 9842679808
